full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #12 (2026-04-25)

PULSE
Health: 0.4589 (C). 889 wallets, 148 contributors. 25 memos today vs 127 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
50 reward payments, 360447 PFT distributed to 23 contributors. Top earner: raL2kv...Gwzd (50000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 19,000 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (10,000 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (9,000 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (68,600 PFT, avg 9,800/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rDVKRN...tyjB (52 memos). 18 new wallet(s) this week. 31 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 82.5%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-03-26): 7176 transactions from 76 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
